name: North Dakota Secretary of State Contractor Search
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official contractor search before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: North Dakota contractor license records exposed by Secretary of State contractor search
knownExclusions: Specialty trade boards, local permits, business registration details, and non-Secretary-of-State authorizations may require separate sources.
Electrical, plumbing, HVAC, and local contractor requirements may not be fully represented by this source entry.
Complaint and enforcement information may require separate official pages or requests.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Do not automate portal access unless access terms and technical controls are reviewed.
publicRecordsNotes: Official Secretary of State contractor-search metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license, registration, or local authorization does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for North Dakota Secretary of State contractor search. Future work should map license classes and whether specialty trade board lookups need separate sources.
maintainerNotes: Keep Secretary of State contractor licensing separate from specialty boards and local licensing.

researchEvidence.note: Official public source, access shape, and current automation constraints reviewed.

blocker.summary: The official path requires or may require protected interactive access; OpenTrade Registry will not bypass technical controls.
